title: Update verify-email.blade.php with design system styling
contract: Replace generic Bootstrap/inline styles in verify-email.blade.php with nothing-tech design system classes: Buttons use .btn-primary for submit, .btn-secondary for links. Cards/containers use .card class with proper padding. Typography uses CSS custom properties for sizes (var(--type-*)). Colors use CSS custom properties (var(--color-*)). Spacing uses CSS custom properties (var(--space-*)). Alert/message boxes styled with design system color variables.
verify: npm run build && grep -q ".btn-primary\|.card" resources/views/auth/verify-email.blade.php && echo "✓ Design system classes applied"
